{{Quote|Yeah, right. You're slime Shalo. You give the Hutts a good name.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref>}}
'''Shalo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who owned a [[Shalo's Cantina|cantina]] on [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Once a petty thug for [[Durga Besadii Tai]], Shalo later worked for [[Hirth]], though that relationship soured and he became reconnected with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], who sent him to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Shalo was able to take over a large portion of his employers assets when the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Nal Hutta|invaded]] [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]. While setting up the [[Great River]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] came to investigate where he was sending his slaves to the Yuuzhan Vong. Shalo tried to take Jacen for the reward that [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] had offered, but [[Talon Karrde]] and [[Shada D'ukal]] brought help from the [[Smugglers' Alliance]], to fight off Shalo's back up. Shalo latter admitted that a convoy carrying [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]], [[Spice/Legends|spice]] and weapons was en route to [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]], and that it would be stopping at Tatooine.

==Behind the scenes==
Shalo was mistakenly identified as a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] in ''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''.
